# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User previously wanted to slice a single skybox image but has now changed their mind. They currently have 6 separate image files and want to implement the skybox using these 6 files.
- User emphasizes that their texture is a single image containing 6 faces in a specific layout (likely a cross/strip shape), instead of 6 separate files. They want to load the skybox using this single file path.
